title: Cubic Leaves
description: Bushy leaves built to be extremely fast, without compromising the vanilla aesthetic.
body:
Cubic Leaves: - Leaves now have a simple new bushy look while keeping things blocky! - Unique designs for some of the different types of leaves. - Supports a ton of different mods! (full list below) - Created to be as performant as it can be without significantly affecting visuals; the performance hit shouldn't be nearly as bad as other bushy leaves resource packs! Resource Pack Editions:
|
Performance
[(release channel)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubic-leaves/versions?c=release)
|
Resource Pack Compatible
[(beta channel)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubic-leaves/versions?c=beta)
| |:---|:---| |• Amazing Performance!
• Incompatible with texture packs.|• Compatible with texture packs!  
• Average Performance.|
Additional Notes & Information:
- It's highly recommended to install both [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/project/AANobbMI) and [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/project/51shyZVL)!
Because of Minecraft's Ambient Occlusion, leaves will have weird and incorrect shading. It can even cause leaves to have incorrect colors at times. Sodium fixes these issues, and improves the accuracy of it!
More Culling increases performace massively when using these types of resource packs.
To get the best looks to performance, go to:
Options > Video Settings > More Culling, and set "Leaves Culling" to the "Check Surroundings" culling type.
- How to fix odd shading with [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shaders?q=Complementary) shaders:
By default, Complementary shaders use an optimization for shadows that causes bushy leaves resource packs to appear too dark (as if they were under a shadow) to fix this, head to:
Options > Video Settings > Shader Packs > Complementary > Shader Pack Settings > Performance Settings, and set "Real-Time Shadows" to High.
---
Supported mods: - The Aether - Ars Nouveau - Atmospheric - Autumnity - [Let's Do] Beachparty - Big Globe - Biomes O' Plenty - [Let's Do] BloomingNature - Cobblemon - Dynamic Trees - Dynamic Trees: The Aether - Dynamic Trees: Autumnity - Dynamic Trees: Biomes O' Plenty - Dynamic Trees: Nature's Spirit - Dynamic Trees: Quark - Environmental - Frights and Foliage - [Let's Do] Meadow - Nature's Spirit - Oh The Biomes We've Gone - Paradise Lost - Promenade - Quark - Regions Unexplored - Twilight Forest - [Let's Do] Vinery - Wilder Wild - More to come!
Planned Features Planned features that I'll be working on:
   ‒  Fast leaves support.
   ‒  Snow covered bushy leaves.
   ‒  More modded leaves support!
   ‒  (maybe) Simple PBR implementation.
Check out my other projects! [https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest](https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest)
